About Us

A wellness journey, led by people who lived it.

Lucky's Wellness is a Herbalife Independent Associate practice founded by certified coaches Dr. R. Ramesh Pandi (B.E., DFN., D.ACU.) and R. Abirami Sundari (M.A., B.Ed., DFN.) — a husband-and-wife team based in Madurai. Coach Ramesh transformed his own health at age 49, losing 23 kg, and together with Abirami has guided hundreds of families to do the same.

Our Mission

Help every family lose or gain weight through good nutrition — sustainably, and without crash diets.

Our Vision

A healthier India — one balanced plate, one informed family, one transformation at a time.

Our Promise

We care, we educate, we coach. One-to-one, every step — from your first analysis to your goal.

See Real Transformations Explore Services
What We Offer

Premium wellness services, personalised for you.

Every program at Lucky's Wellness starts with understanding you — your body composition, lifestyle, and goals — before a single plan is drawn up.

Weight Management

Lose or gain weight the healthy way — guided meal plans with measurable check-ins every week.

Learn more →

Nutrition Coaching

Understand macros, micros, hydration and timing — so eating well becomes second nature, not a chore.

Learn more →

Personalised Diet Plan

A diet built around your body, your routine and your South-Indian palate — not a generic template.

Learn more →

Wellness Consultation

Free first-time body composition analysis and goal-mapping session — in person at Madurai or online.

Learn more →

Lifestyle Transformation

Sleep, stress, hydration, movement — every lever pulled together for sustainable change.

Learn more →

Fitness Guidance

Movement plans matched to your level — beginner-friendly walks, home routines, or gym pairing.

Learn more →

Health Monitoring

Weekly check-ins on weight, waist, muscle, fat % and hydration — so we adjust, not guess.

Learn more →

Personal Coaching

One-to-one access to your coach — WhatsApp, calls and visits. Real accountability, real results.

Learn more →
Premium Nutrition

Products that fuel real results.

Backed by Herbalife — the world's #1 active & lifestyle nutrition brand, with 300+ scientists across 19 labs. We recommend only what fits your plan.

Why Choose Us

Six reasons families choose Lucky's Wellness.

01

Personalised Guidance

Your plan is built around your body composition, lifestyle and food preferences — never a generic template.

02

Proven Results

Hundreds of real transformations across Madurai and beyond — from weight loss to family wellness.

03

Professional Support

Coaches with Diploma in Food & Nutrition (DFN), Acupressure (D.ACU) and years of in-the-field experience.

04

Trusted Wellness Solutions

Products backed by Herbalife — the world's #1 active & lifestyle nutrition brand, present in 95 markets.

05

Continuous Monitoring

Weekly check-ins on weight, waist, muscle, fat % and hydration. We adapt the plan as your body changes.

06

Goal-Oriented Programs

Clear milestones, clear timelines, clear celebration of every win — small or big.
